prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical street-fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman with long dark wavy hair leaning sideways against a textured concrete urban wall covered with faded graffiti, peeling paint, stains, and worn posters. She is full-body in frame, standing casually with one leg straight and the other knee bent, the sole of one white sneaker pressed against the wall. She holds a silver-and-black vintage film camera with a large lens in both hands at chest height, fingers adjusting the lens, with a focused yet relaxed pose and her head slightly tilted downward toward the camera. Outfit: oversized medium-blue denim jacket worn open, black cropped top, high-waisted loose black jeans, white chunky sneakers, and a small simple necklace. Use natural daylight, soft overcast shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric textures, muted urban color grading, documentary street photography feel, 35mm lens perspective, vertical 2:3 composition. Keep the background wall dominant and gritty, with no readable prominent text, no watermark, no extra people, and no stylized illustration effects.
